Comptroller Gould Statement on Notice of Proposed Rulemakings to Modernize Regulatory Capital Framework
summary: Comptroller of the Currency Jonathan V. Gould issued the following statement today at the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation's (FDIC) board meeting about two proposals to modernize the regulatory capital framework for banking organizations of all sizes.

title: Agencies Request Comment on Proposals to Modernize the Regulatory Capital Framework and Maintain the Strength of the Banking System
summary: The federal bank regulatory agencies today requested comment on three proposals to modernize the regulatory capital framework for banks of all sizes. The proposals would streamline capital requirements and better align regulatory capital with risk while maintaining the safety and soundness of the banking system.

title: Consistent Basis Reporting Between Estate and Person Acquiring Property From Decedent; Correction
summary: This document contains corrections to a final rule (TD 9991), which was published in the Federal Register on Tuesday, September 17, 2024 (89 FR 76356). That document inadvertently overwrote some previous language, and this document corrects the final regulations.
